zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Blois於大約1100年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux56歲，母親Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois39歲。她於大約1115年與Renaud de Joigny在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1180年2月9日在法國布格喬尼享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Blois于大约1100年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux56岁，母亲Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois39岁。她于大约1115年与Renaud de Joigny在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1180年2月9日在法国布格喬尼享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Blois was born about 1100, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, was 56 and her mother, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, was 39. She married Renaud de Joigny about 1115, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 9 February 1180, in Joigny, Yonne, Burgundy, France, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Blois est née environ 1100, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud de Joigny environ 1115, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 février 1180, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Blois um 1100 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux 56 und ihre Mutter Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois 39. Sie hat um 1115 in Europa Renaud de Joigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Februar 1180 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Joigny, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Blois è nata il circa 1100 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Renaud de Joigny circa 1115, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1180, nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Bloisが約1100年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxは56歳，母Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisは39歳であった。約1115年にヨーロッパでRenaud de Joignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1180年2月9日にフランスボウルゴグンイオンジョイグニーで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Blois(이)가 대략 1100년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1115년 우럽에서 Renaud de Joigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 2월 9일 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 조익니에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Blois nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud de Joigny aproximadamente 1115, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1180, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Blois родилась около 1100 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud de Joigny около 1115 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 февраля 1180 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Blois nació aproximadamente 1100, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Renaud de Joigny aproximadamente 1115, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1180, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 81 años.
